message:
perf(session): consolidate incremental append serialization into single buffer

Replace Vec<Vec<u8>> (N allocations per entry) with a single Vec<u8> buffer
in the incremental save path. Use serde_json::to_writer directly into the
buffer, eliminating intermediate allocations from to_vec(). Background thread
now writes the entire buffer in one write_all() call instead of N separate
writes through a BufWriter, reducing syscall overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
